program.title: My Secretary Who Once Was My Wife
program.subTitle: Subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: A couple who divorced after a 1-year marriage on paper accidentally reunites as a secretary and a CEO and fall in love.
program.description: Ha-eun signs a 1-year contract marriage on paper to pay her grandmother's medical bills, not knowing that her partner has been mistakenly replaced with Dohyun, an heir to a rich family. Accidentally reunited as a new secretary and a coldhearted CEO after a long time, Ha-eun and Dohyun find themselves drawn to each other and fall in love.
program.casting: Jin Ju-hyung, Kim So-eun,
program.synopsis: Ha-eun signs a 1-year contract marriage on paper to pay her grandmother's medical bills, not knowing that her partner has been mistakenly replaced with Dohyun, an heir to a rich family. Accidentally reunited as a new secretary and a coldhearted CEO after a long time, Ha-eun and Dohyun find themselves drawn to each other and fall in love.

program.title: I Can Touch You
program.subTitle: Subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: Hasty but happy marriage of a foster daughter abandoned for tarnishing her family's name, and a CEO allergic to females
program.description: After spending an accidental one night with Hasung, the CEO who's allergic to females, Yujin, a foster daughter of the Kang family, is put in danger of being abandoned for tarnishing her family's name. Hasung saves her at the right moment and ties the knot with her right away. When Yujin's wounded heart was healed during her happy marriage, the Kang family shows up for a belated apology.
program.casting: Ji Ho-geun, Ha Ye-eun, Yubin, Kim Geon-ho, Kim Seon-o
program.synopsis: After spending an accidental one night with Hasung, the CEO who's allergic to females, Yujin, a foster daughter of the Kang family, is put in danger of being abandoned for tarnishing her family's name. program.title: The Bedmate Game Sharehouse in Japan
program.subTitle: subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: Bedmate swaps daily, intimate contact mandatory. Steamy romance and drama unfold on <Sex-Positive Sharehouse>.
program.description: Juri joins the adults-only dating show "Must-Sleep-Together Sharehouse," where contestants must change bed partners daily and show physical affection every day. Inside, she reunites with her ex-boyfriend Yuta, the gentle Akihito, and the seductive Umi, while their ex-girlfriends move in as well. Romance or prize money? Juri wavers between instinct and reason.
program.casting: Ayaka, Gennosuke, Yume Hayashi, Kano Takahashi, Daisuke Hayakawa, Ryudai Onikura
program.synopsis: Juri joins the adults-only dating show "Must-Sleep-Together Sharehouse," where contestants must change bed partners daily and show physical affection every day. Inside, she reunites with her ex-boyfriend Yuta, the gentle Akihito, and the seductive Umi, while their ex-girlfriends move in as well. Romance or prize money? Juri wavers between instinct and reason.

program.title: Quiet in the Office!
program.subTitle: Quiet in the Office!
program.logLine: I ran into the worst boss at the worst possible moment. And from that second on, everything began to change.
program.description: Nayul was at her breaking point. Between the crushing workload and her detestable boss, Kwon Sijin—a man who perfected the art of trampling on dignity—she’d had enough. At 11 PM on a Friday, driven by pure rage, she stormed into his office. There, time froze. Nayul stood paralyzed, having caught her "perfect" yet perverted boss in the middle of a private, lewd act during overtime.
program.casting: Lee Jae-bin, Kim Yulhee, Kim Jin-kwon
program.synopsis: Nayul was at her breaking point. Between the crushing workload and her detestable boss, Kwon Sijin—a man who perfected the art of trampling on dignity—she’d had enough. At 11 PM on a Friday, driven by pure rage, she stormed into his office. There, time froze. Nayul stood paralyzed, having caught her "perfect" yet perverted boss in the middle of a private, lewd act during overtime.

program.title: The Secret Night Tutor
program.subTitle: Subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: A secret historical romance about a lifelong single court lady, perfect in theory but with zero real-life experience, and the Crown Prince as they embark on intimate lessons of love!
program.description: Hong Dan, a court lady assigned to teach Crown Prince Heon the arts of the night, is hiding a secret—she must never be discovered as a virgin. Amid suspicious rumors, their perilous lessons continue, and the two begin to uncover each other’s true feelings. But sensing their growing closeness, Crown Princess Seryeong starts to tighten her sharp and relentless pressure. In the end, through Seryeong’s scheme, Dan’s true identity is exposed, and she is expelled from the palace…
program.casting: CHA JUNHO, HEO HYUNSEO
program.synopsis: Hong Dan, a court lady assigned to teach Crown Prince Heon the arts of the night, is hiding a secret—she must never be discovered as a virgin. program.title: Save Me with Latte Kiss
program.subTitle: Sun and Moon touch each other to survive
program.logLine: My boss is my energizer! Survival skinship romance between the Sun and Moon
program.description: Always craving for male energy, Moon Boreum, who's been single since birth, coincidentally experiences a physical contact with Sun Taeyang one day, which brings her a fulfilling satisfaction for the first time in her life. Boreum gets caught up in a mysterious emotion after signing the unwanted skinship contract with this powerful energizer to begin a thrilling survival romance.
program.casting: Lee Haeum, Ki Hyunwoo, Lee Jungjun, Ko Joohee, Ryu Yijin, Cheon Woojin

program.title: Today I Divorce My Superstar Husband
program.subTitle: Today I Divorce My Superstar Husband (TEST)
program.logLine: The hidden wife of Korea's biggest star. After the divorce, she finally takes back her name and her life.
program.description: Kang Hye-in secretly marries Choi Hyun, Korea's biggest star, and endures contempt and betrayal alone in their hidden marriage. After the tragedy of losing her child, she decides to divorce him. With the separation, the life Hye-in kept from Hyun quietly begins to unfold, and the moment she lets everything go, her life takes an unexpected turn.
program.casting: Jin Joo-hyung, Jung Seung-kyung, Lee Sun-min, Ahn Yi-seo
program.synopsis: Kang Hye-in secretly marries Choi Hyun, Korea's biggest star, and endures contempt and betrayal alone in their hidden marriage. After the tragedy of losing her child, she decides to divorce him. With the separation, the life Hye-in kept from Hyun quietly begins to unfold, and the moment she lets everything go, her life takes an unexpected turn.

program.title: Was It Just a Coincidence... or Fate?
program.subTitle: A One-Night Stand with the One I Secretly Loved
program.logLine: Coincidence or Fate? A desperate deal with her unrequited love ignites a dark, obsessive fire.
program.description:
Driven to the edge by a life falling apart, Hayun makes a desperate choice: selling herself to Jun-hyeok, the man she has secretly loved for years. To her, it’s a heartbreaking end to her unspoken crush, but to him, she’s just a "bought woman" to be toyed with and humiliated.
However, once her true identity is revealed, his cold-blooded contempt ignites into a dangerous, dark obsession. Now, he refuses to let her go. Can they survive the twisted fate sparked by secrets and raw desire?
program.casting: Park Si-yeon,  Ji Ho-geun
program.synopsis:
Driven to the edge by a life falling apart, Hayun makes a desperate choice: selling herself to Jun-hyeok, the man she has secretly loved for years. To her, it’s a heartbreaking end to her unspoken crush, but to him, she’s just a "bought woman" to be toyed with and humiliated.
However, once her true identity is revealed, his cold-blooded contempt ignites into a dangerous, dark obsession. Now, he refuses to let her go. Can they survive the twisted fate sparked by secrets and raw desire?

program.title: The Bedmate Game Sharehouse 2
program.subTitle: Sensational dating reality show is back
program.logLine: The Bedmate Game Sharehouse 2 is back with even spicier and more spark-flying content. But… I'm the Meggie this time?
program.description: Harry is on the second season of <The Bedmate Game Sharehouse>, an R-rated dating reality show, as the role of Meggie, who has the privilege of choosing her first date. Participants go through emotional twirling every day, walking on a tightrope under spicier rules. Exes vs new, love vs strategy! The show gets even more exciting between missions with a huge cash prize given every night and love.
program.casting: Lee Yoon-seo, Min Ha-ram, Jang Eui-su, Jang Eun-bi, Ahn Jun-won, Joo Hye-won
program.synopsis: Harry is on the second season of <The Bedmate Game Sharehouse>, an R-rated dating reality show, as the role of Meggie, who has the privilege of choosing her first date. Participants go through emotional twirling every day, walking on a tightrope under spicier rules. Exes vs new, love vs strategy! The show gets even more exciting between missions with a huge cash prize given every night and love.

program.title: My Boss, My Rules
program.subTitle: Subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: Kang Seung-gi is an old-fashioned team leader who constantly nitpicks about rules and principles while pressuring his subordinates. One day, contract employee Se-yeon accidentally discovers Seung-gi’s secret sexual preference and begins to manipulate the feared team leader—someone no one else dares to challenge—however she pleases.
program.description: The ultimate hierarchy society—K-company. Among them, Se-yeon is a contract employee positioned at the very bottom of the company’s food chain. Today again, tasks assigned from above slide down like a playground slide and land squarely on her desk. In this rigid vertical culture where no one dares speak back to their superiors, Se-yeon stands out. As an MZ-generation contract worker, she is honest and bold, never backing down even when facing Seung-gi. But the old-school team leader Seung-gi is no easy opponent either. The relationship between the two, which seemed impossible to overturn, is completely flipped by an unexpected incident. After discovering Seung-gi’s secret sexual preference, Se-yeon begins to use it as leverage to control him. At the office she loses, but in bed she wins. What will become of the push-and-pull relationship between the two?
program.casting:
Kim Keun-mok, Jung Gu-hyeon
, Kang So-yeon
program.synopsis: The ultimate hierarchy society—K-company. Among them, Se-yeon is a contract employee positioned at the very bottom of the company’s food chain. program.title: The Billionaire Ex-Wife Strikes Back
program.subTitle: The Wife He Threw Away Rises
program.logLine: After sacrificing everything, a discarded wife returns as the power her ex-husband never saw coming.
program.description: Hannah sacrificed everything her future, her youth, even the life she once dreamed of to elevate her husband toward the greatness he wanted. But when she returned from years abroad, he repaid her devotion by discarding and divorcing her. She comes back not as the woman who once lived for him but as the power he never imagined. And now, the true reckoning begins.
program.casting:
Rebecca Barnes
Will Stagg
Scott Newey
program.synopsis: Hannah sacrificed everything her future, her youth, even the life she once dreamed of to elevate her husband toward the greatness he wanted. But when she returned from years abroad, he repaid her devotion by discarding and divorcing her. She comes back not as the woman who once lived for him but as the power he never imagined. And now, the true reckoning begins.

program.title: Romantic Island
program.subTitle: The Love War Between Ex, First Love, and Boyfriend
program.logLine: On a 19+ dating show, Yeji met her ex-husband, her first love, and her current boyfriend. 'Do I really have to spend the night with all three of them?’
program.description:
Yeji enters a 19+ dating show with a huge cash prize for her boyfriend who lost everything.
The only way to win the 1.9 billion prize is to spend the night with another man.
There, she meets Jae-hyun, her first love, and Do-hyuk, the ex-husband she broke up with after an affair.
Between true love, the 1.9 billion prize, and her own desires—what will Yeji choose?
program.casting:
Lee Jiyeon, Ki Hyunwoo, Kim Hanyoung 
Kim Nuri, Won Yubin, Kim Yunseo
program.synopsis:
Yeji enters a 19+ dating show with a huge cash prize for her boyfriend who lost everything.

There, she meets Jae-hyun, her first love, and Do-hyuk, the ex-husband she broke up with after an affair.
Between true love, the 1.9 billion prize, and her own desires—what will Yeji choose?

program.title: Fox Scandal
program.subTitle: Subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: After surviving abuse, Yoonnhee approaches Taewoo to reclaim her family. But love changes their plan, and they unite for revenge.
program.description: Stripped of her family and forced to endure a cruel living hell, Park Yoon-hee survives as the heir of the Black Tiger clan under years of abuse from her psychopathic stepfather. While secretly preparing for revenge, her life changes when Kim Tae-woo, the fearless heir of the White Tiger clan, appears before her. The moment she realizes his one-sided and blind devotion, Yoon-hee makes a decision—to use his love to destroy her stepfather and reclaim her stolen legacy. But what begins as calculation soon takes an unexpected turn. Revenge or love—at the end of her choice, will Yoon-hee finally find her freedom?
program.casting: Kim Hwanyoung , Kim Sieun
program.synopsis: Stripped of her family and forced to endure a cruel living hell, Park Yoon-hee survives as the heir of the Black Tiger clan under years of abuse from her psychopathic stepfather. program.title: Burning The Line
program.subTitle: Subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: A dangerously forbidden romance of a bride-to-be who falls in love with her lifelong best friend’s son.
program.description: With her wedding only two months away, Sunwoo finds herself in a confusing time, unsure whether going through with the marriage is the right choice or if she truly loves Jaeseong. While sitting listlessly at her regular bar, she meets Eunho, a new bartender. The moment their eyes meet, they can’t seem to look away from each other, as if struck by electricity. Not long after, during a university lecture where Sunwoo is teaching, she notices Eunho—who belongs to another department—sitting in the front row and staring straight at her. For some reason, his gaze makes her heart tremble. After class, they begin talking and gradually feel themselves drawn to one another. As they start exchanging personal messages, their connection deepens, eventually leading them to share drinks together…
program.casting: Kim Ji-hoon, Son Ye-ji, Cho Sung-jae, Oh Eun-jin
program.synopsis: With her wedding only two months away, Sunwoo finds herself in a confusing time, unsure whether going through with the marriage is the right choice or if she truly loves Jaeseong. program.title: The True CEO's Revenge: My Cheating Husband
program.subTitle: subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: Betrayed by her cheating husband and his secretary, CEO Aya plots revenge to reclaim her company and find true love.
program.description: YJ Tech CEO Aya catches her husband Jun and his secretary Rina having an affair. Diagnosed with a precancerous stomach, Aya plots revenge. She tricks Jun into signing a divorce agreement and reclaims the shares she gave him, forcing him out. As Jun falls and Rina's fake credentials are exposed, Subaru, the Ichijo Foundation heir who has loved Aya since college, helps her start a new life.
program.casting: Mana Asaki, Seishiro Tachibana, Ayane Kinoshita, Yuhei Chiwata
program.synopsis: YJ Tech CEO Aya catches her husband Jun and his secretary Rina having an affair. Diagnosed with a precancerous stomach, Aya plots revenge. She tricks Jun into signing a divorce agreement and reclaims the shares she gave him, forcing him out. As Jun falls and Rina's fake credentials are exposed, Subaru, the Ichijo Foundation heir who has loved Aya since college, helps her start a new life.

program.title: All In on Highschool Boss
program.subTitle: Subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: An abused housewife is drawn into illegal online gambling—and into a dangerous alliance with a high school boss.
program.description: Thirty-six-year-old housewife Son Yeon-su has endured an abusive marriage for the sake of her son. One day, she stumbles upon an illegal online gambling site—only to discover it’s run by Woo-jin, her son’s high school friend. What begins as a transaction turns into a dangerous partnership. Living as a submissive wife, a criminal accomplice, and a mother, Yeon-su starts risking everything. Is this love, or her only way out? For the first time, she bets on her own life.
program.casting: Cha Seung-hwan, Eun-ho, Han Dong-woo, Baek I-on, Jang Maru
program.synopsis: Thirty-six-year-old housewife Son Yeon-su has endured an abusive marriage for the sake of her son. Living as a submissive wife, a criminal accomplice, and a mother, Yeon-su starts risking everything. Is this love, or her only way out? For the first time, she bets on her own life.

program.title: The Capable Lady, CEO Fu Is Crying Again
program.subTitle: Poor Husband Spends Millions on Her
program.logLine: Believing her husband was poor, she discovers he gifted an expensive piece of jewelry to his first love—and, consumed by betrayal, decides to file for divorce.
program.description: If not for a delivery encounter, Su Yan would never have imagined: her poor husband of four years dating, three years married, gifting billions in jewelry to a childhood friend. He waited calmly for her, but she returned with divorce papers.
program.casting: Dong-i, Su-yu-syu
program.synopsis: If not for a delivery encounter, Su Yan would never have imagined: her poor husband of four years dating, three years married, gifting billions in jewelry to a childhood friend. He waited calmly for her, but she returned with divorce papers.

program.title: D-100: Marry My Ex To My Bestie
program.subTitle: Subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: A woman who returns 100 days before her death joins forces with her once-missed arranged fiancé to exact perfect revenge on the traitors who tried to kill her.
program.description: On her wedding day, Yerin is betrayed by her fiancé and best friend and loses her life. In her final moments, she realizes the only man who truly loved her was the one she once rejected. When she wakes up at the moment of the proposal, she chooses revenge—bringing the two together and leading them toward ruin. But as she grows closer to the man she once turned away, her feelings begin to change. Caught between revenge and love, can Yerin reclaim everything and find true love?
program.casting: Ji Ho-geun, Jung Ye-na
program.synopsis: On her wedding day, Yerin is betrayed by her fiancé and best friend and loses her life. program.title: The Return of the Nation's Heir
program.subTitle: Blood-Soaked Revenge Against the Wicked
program.logLine:
Choi San, a wealthy heir who lay in a vegetative state for three years, finally awakens—
and a ruthless, satisfying revenge begins against those who humiliated him and his family.
program.description:
Choi San, the sole heir of the global conglomerate GX Group and the son of the Minister of Defense,suffers a mysterious accident before his girlfriend Jisu and remains in a vegetative state for three years.Unaware of his true identity, Jisu cares for him while joining clinical trials
and working in a restaurant kitchen; her family even sells their home to cover the medical bills.
All they receive in return is scorn and mockery from relatives.The moment Choi San finally awakens after silently hearing it all,the brutal counterattack of a powerful heir begins.
program.casting: Ahn Jung-hoon, Ahn Chae-hee, Lee Kan-hee
program.synopsis:
Choi San, the sole heir of the global conglomerate GX Group and the son of the Minister of Defense,suffers a mysterious accident before his girlfriend Jisu and remains in a vegetative state for three years.Unaware of his true identity, Jisu cares for him while joining clinical trials
and working in a restaurant kitchen; her family even sells their home to cover the medical bills.

program.title: Law Firm Romance: The Attorney and the Secretary
program.subTitle: The night erased by a wrongly left phone
program.logLine: A drunken one-night stand with Seoyeon accidentally turns into a night with Yurim in Dojin's memory.
program.description: Kang Seoyeon, a law firm secretary, spends a drunken one night with her boss, Attorney Yoon Dojin, by mistake, but it accidentally turns into a night with Yurim in Dojin's memory. For fear of getting fired, Seoyeon keeps it a secret, but Dojin finds himself gradually falling for Seoyeon for no reason.
program.casting: Kim Hanyoung, Moon Da-in, Kim Jiyun, Kim Yeong-guk
program.synopsis: Kang Seoyeon, a law firm secretary, spends a drunken one night with her boss, Attorney Yoon Dojin, by mistake, but it accidentally turns into a night with Yurim in Dojin's memory. For fear of getting fired, Seoyeon keeps it a secret, but Dojin finds himself gradually falling for Seoyeon for no reason.

program.title: I Slept With My Dad's Best Friend
program.subTitle: Falling for Her Dad’s Best Friend
program.logLine: After a brutal breakup, Hannha rebound spirals when her summer fling turns out to be her dad’s best friend.
program.description: After catching her boyfriend cheating, Hannah swears off love, until a chance meeting at a bar changes everything. The charming older man who makes her laugh and feel alive again seems too good to be true. Their summer fling turns passionate, but when Hannah discovers he’s her dad’s best friend, her world shatters. Now she must choose between her heart and the fallout of forbidden love.
program.casting: Cody Bruno, Cayla Brady
program.synopsis: After catching her boyfriend cheating, Hannah swears off love, until a chance meeting at a bar changes everything. The charming older man who makes her laugh and feel alive again seems too good to be true. Their summer fling turns passionate, but when Hannah discovers he’s her dad’s best friend, her world shatters. Now she must choose between her heart and the fallout of forbidden love.

program.title: Fiery Love
program.subTitle: Rich girl, bankrupt, ends up married
program.logLine: Jiang Zhiwei went abroad to find a cure for her daughter. She returned three years later—but her family had changed.
program.description: After her stepfather dies, Su Nian and her family face losing their home. She joins the Fu family to gain a chance, becomes entangled in a series of events with Fu Chenyan, and gradually they recognize their feelings and find happiness together.
program.casting: Jo Cheon-gae，Paeng Yo
program.synopsis: After her stepfather dies, Su Nian and her family face losing their home. She joins the Fu family to gain a chance, becomes entangled in a series of events with Fu Chenyan, and gradually they recognize their feelings and find happiness together.

program.title: Broke Single Mom's Accidental Fairytale
program.subTitle: Where one night turns into forever
program.logLine: A struggling single mother’s one-night encounter with a billionaire CEO turns hardship into unexpected love.
program.description: Elaine Carter is a 40-year-old single mother weighed down by debt and responsibility, with no space left for love. One desperate night, she meets James Reed, a cold, powerful billionaire CEO who believes family was never meant for him. When Elaine discovers she is pregnant with James’s child, what begins as a fleeting encounter blossoms into a life-changing love.
program.casting: Robert Palmer Watkins Tori Wilder
program.synopsis: Elaine Carter is a 40-year-old single mother weighed down by debt and responsibility, with no space left for love. One desperate night, she meets James Reed, a cold, powerful billionaire CEO who believes family was never meant for him. When Elaine discovers she is pregnant with James’s child, what begins as a fleeting encounter blossoms into a life-changing love.

program.title: Bloodbound Luna
program.subTitle: Subtitle Test(VIS 업로드용)
program.logLine: A hidden hybrid and a wolf Alpha ignite a bond that could unite—or destroy—their supernatural world.
program.description: On prom night, Luna awakens a forbidden bond with Jacob, the Alpha of the Nightclaw pack. As her blood reveals she is neither wolf nor vampire but a powerful hybrid, war ignites between packs and vampires. Forced into exile and hunted by a vampire king, Luna must choose who she is—and return to claim her power beside Jacob.
program.synopsis: On prom night, Luna awakens a forbidden bond with Jacob, the Alpha of the Nightclaw pack. Forced into exile and hunted by a vampire king, Luna must choose who she is—and return to claim her power beside Jacob.

program.title: Lady Boss's Perfect Revenge
program.logLine: A contract marriage with a powerful CEO shatters her ex-boyfriend's arrogance and turns betrayal into revenge.
program.description: After seven years of sacrifice, Ye-won is betrayed by her boyfriend and publicly humiliated when he chooses to marry his wealthy benefactor. On the same day, she enters a contract marriage with Tae-jun, the CEO of Kanghan Group. Returning as the group's powerful mistress, Yewon turns the tables, revealing her true identity as the real owner of the Sera Group, and beginning her revenge.
program.casting: Lee Ji-hoon, Kim Yi-hyeon, Kim Rui
program.synopsis: After seven years of sacrifice, Ye-won is betrayed by her boyfriend and publicly humiliated when he chooses to marry his wealthy benefactor. On the same day, she enters a contract marriage with Tae-jun, the CEO of Kanghan Group. program.title: A whirlwind proposal
program.subTitle: subtitle(VIS)
program.logLine: In this romance-revenge drama, a female CEO reveals her identity to her ex who abandoned her and finds true love.
program.description: Saki, the female CEO of the world's largest finance company, dropped out of school to support her boyfriend, Kaitani, but after 7 years, he abandoned her for her insufficient academic background. Heartbroken, Saki has a fake marriage with Kujo, which gradually turns into true love. After being harshly insulted by people at Kaitani's welcome party, Saki dramatically reveals her identity in the end.
program.casting: Mitsuki Hasegawa, Takuya Terada, Higashi Natsuki, Keiko Morikawa
program.synopsis: Saki, the female CEO of the world's largest finance company, dropped out of school to support her boyfriend, Kaitani, but after 7 years, he abandoned her for her insufficient academic background. program.title: Eldest Daughter's Marriage Life
program.subTitle: A janitor in disguise changed my life
program.logLine: In this romance drama, a rich son in disguise as a janitor and a desperate eldest daughter start a newlywed life.
program.description: After accidentally helping Eunha, who collapsed in the street, Sunyoung unexpectedly marries Eunha's brother Taesung, a rich son in disguise as a janitor. Unaware of Taesung's identity, Sunyoung navigates a newlywed life full of hardship. Taesung secretly helps Sunyoung find her lost sister. While embracing each other's family, they turn their marriage that started with lies into heartfelt love.
program.casting:
Han Seo-jun, Kim Ye-eun, 
Oh Yeon-hee, Kim Geon-ho

program.title: Secretary Undercover
program.subTitle: A disguised secretary falls for her boss
program.logLine: Office romance between a male-disguised secretary and a rich heir boss with a female phobia
program.description: To pay her parents' debt, Seowon sneaks into Ellen Corporation in disguise as a male secretary and works in the Vice President Kangjun's office. Seowon and Kangjun unknowingly fall for each other, and Kangjun's fiancée, Sera, and Director Dongjin also grow feelings for Seowon, making this relationship even more complicated. Can Seowon complete her mission successfully in this chaos?
program.casting: Lee Ji Yeon, Kim Han Young, Kim Moon Gi, Lee Seo
program.synopsis: To pay her parents' debt, Seowon sneaks into Ellen Corporation in disguise as a male secretary and works in the Vice President Kangjun's office. Seowon and Kangjun unknowingly fall for each other, and Kangjun's fiancée, Sera, and Director Dongjin also grow feelings for Seowon, making this relationship even more complicated. Can Seowon complete her mission successfully in this chaos?

program.title: Cold Brew, Warm Heart
program.subTitle: Heart hunter, heir seeker, danger lurks
program.logLine: Xie Junlin is sexually frigid. To inherit, he pursues nurse Tao Tao—the only one who arouses him—in a comical chase.
program.description: Xie Junlin developed sexual dysfunction from childhood trauma. His grandfather's will stipulates that the first to bear a child inherits the company. Upon medical advice, he undergoes stimulation therapy and unexpectedly finds that nurse Tao Tao triggers a normal physiological response in him. He begins aggressively pursuing her, leading to a series of amusing incidents.
program.casting: Wang Yeonheum，Baek Seoryeo
program.synopsis: Xie Junlin developed sexual dysfunction from childhood trauma. His grandfather's will stipulates that the first to bear a child inherits the company. Upon medical advice, he undergoes stimulation therapy and unexpectedly finds that nurse Tao Tao triggers a normal physiological response in him. He begins aggressively pursuing her, leading to a series of amusing incidents.

program.title: Love for One
program.subTitle: Drunk, in the wrong room, he made her
program.logLine: "One night as a couple, a hundred nights of affection." Huo Liechen thinks of Su Jinhuan constantly.
program.description: After a night of drunkenness, Su Jinhuan, the least favored daughter of the Su family, accidentally ends up with Huo Liechen, the wealthy heir of the Huo family. The next morning, she tries to run, but Huo Liechen relentlessly pursues her, wanting her to take responsibility. "One night as a couple, a hundred nights of affection," he thinks of her every second.
program.casting: Lee Mong-yeon，Cheong Wi
program.synopsis: After a night of drunkenness, Su Jinhuan, the least favored daughter of the Su family, accidentally ends up with Huo Liechen, the wealthy heir of the Huo family.
